/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/_num_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sbzrgn/Desktop/My-ROS2_Projects/My-ROS2/TalktoMCU_without_uROS/build/talk_to_mcu_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
